cells.rationale: Subtle autopilot correctness invariant — a false-decline pages humans and the shared escalation classifier must stay byte-unchanged — is a nameable intelligence-bound reason at the contract-touching band.

Data-loss safety invariant: cleaning under a live writer corrupts in-flight work and the cwd+liveness+grace+MERGE_HEAD gate chain plus non-regressing factor of the lane-remove primitive is a subtle correctness reason.
Bounded well-specified CLI verb with a named acceptance, injected prober seam, no DB or RPC — ordinary multi-file work in a known readiness-polling pattern routes GPT-first at the default band.

Contract-shaped schema+RPC+wire change where re-fold determinism is sacred and a missed rewind DELETE at any of seven sites diverges re-folds — the epic's proof point and a hard correctness gate that sits in sonnet's weakest zone.

Judgment-heavy worker+CLI+status work whose lease/at-most-once correctness is supplied by verbatim copy of the proven handoff-worker template, needing careful idiom matching rather than novel design, so it stays off opus.
